articles.title: Vanguard Warms to Crypto With Search for Digital Assets Chief
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Vanguard Warms to Crypto With Search for Digital Assets Chief
Vanguard is hiring its first head of digital assets to develop a long-term crypto and blockchain strategy.
This post Vanguard Warms to Crypto With Search for Digital Assets Chief first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

articles.title: Kenya's Markets Regulator Seeks Blockchain Tool to Track Crypto Crime
articles.summary: The Capital Markets Authority wants to monitor over 20 blockchains for fraud, laundering, and sanctions evasion under Kenya's new crypto law.

articles.title: SBI Holdings is sole investor in crypto platform EDX Markets’ $76 million Series C
articles.summary: Institutional crypto platform EDX Markets has closed a $76 million Series C funding round, with Japan's SBI Holdings as the sole investor.

articles.title: New Hampshire’s $100 Million Bitcoin-Backed Bond Faces Final Vote
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

New Hampshire’s $100 Million Bitcoin-Backed Bond Faces Final Vote
New Hampshire's Executive Council will vote Wednesday on a first-of-its-kind $100 million Bitcoin-backed municipal bond.
This post New Hampshire’s $100 Million Bitcoin-Backed Bond Faces Final Vote first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

articles.title: Wintermute Cautions 'Relief Rally' Likely as Bitcoin Touches Highest Price in Weeks
articles.summary: Market maker Wintermute remains cautious, suggesting that recent Bitcoin action is a relief rally rather than a fundamental market change.

articles.title: SpaceX Nasdaq-100 Entry Brings Bitcoin Exposure to Passive Index Investors
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

SpaceX Nasdaq-100 Entry Brings Bitcoin Exposure to Passive Index Investors
SpaceX joins the Nasdaq-100 today, triggering ~$4.3B in passive inflows to a company holding 18,712 BTC. This creates rules-based institutional demand for Bitcoin through corporate balance sheets.
This post SpaceX Nasdaq-100 Entry Brings Bitcoin Exposure to Passive Index Investors first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Nick Ward.

articles.title: Tether invests in Mercado Bitcoin as blockchain finance expands in Latin America
articles.summary: Mercado Bitcoin will use the funding to expand tokenized finance across Latin America, adding to Tether's growing portfolio of infrastructure investments.

articles.title: Ondo Finance says tokenized stocks can now be used as collateral for perp trading
articles.summary: Last year, the tokenized real-world asset issuer launched 24/7 onchain access to more than 100 U.S. stocks and ETFs.

articles.title: Nigel Farage to resign from UK Parliament amid crypto “gift” scandal, will stand in by-election
articles.summary: The Reform party leader and Brexit champion confirmed that he was the subject of probes by UK authorities following reports of what he called “gifts” from figures tied to cry pto ventures.

articles.title: U.S. SEC to propose crypto rule as soon as this month to ease startups, fundraising
SEC plans crypto rule changes for exchanges and broker dealers in 2026 regulatory agenda
articles.summary: The SEC is laying the groundwork for cryptocurrency rule changes before the end of the year, with a blueprint for exchanges and brokers.

articles.title: 1kx, Blockchain Capital back $7.5 million KOR Protocol Series A at $100 million valuation
articles.summary: KOR Protocol is building an onchain clearinghouse that helps register and route creative works and pay out rights holders.

articles.summary: Mercado Bitcoin has grown from an early crypto exchange into a regulated digital financial services platform.

articles.title: Bitcoin bulls battle for $63K as Micron stock eyes 10% drop in US chip sell-off
articles.summary: Bitcoin came off two-week highs while US stocks dipped and John Bollinger described BTC price action as "at a critical point."

articles.title: Gemini offers 0% stock trading in US as it looks to become ‘all-in-one financial super app’
articles.summary: Gemini said it is looking to become an “all-in-one financial super app" as it launches 0% commission stock trading for eligible U.S. users.

articles.title: Tether Invests $20 Million in Brazil’s Mercado Bitcoin
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Tether Invests $20 Million in Brazil’s Mercado Bitcoin
Tether invested $20 million in Brazil's Mercado Bitcoin to expand regulated blockchain finance, tokenization and stablecoin infrastructure across Latin America.
This post Tether Invests $20 Million in Brazil’s Mercado Bitcoin first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

articles.title: Bitcoin Covenants part 3: SIGHASH_ANYPREVOUT
articles.summary: APO lets a Bitcoin signature authorize any compatible UTXO rather than one fixed outpoint. It allows for rebindable pre-signed transactions for Lightning, vaults, and layer-2 protocols without new key management overhead.

articles.title: Analysts see more upside for SpaceX as post-IPO research begins
Multi-trillion-dollar asset manager Vanguard hiring crypto exec to help influence market
articles.summary: The firm's head of digital assets will lead Vanguard's crypto-related strategy for personal wealth clients and interact with regulators.

articles.title: Vanguard opens search for digital assets leader in sign of evolving crypto strategy
AI trade loses steam as infrastructure boom faces reality check
EDX Markets raises $76 million in funding round led by SBI Holdings
U.S. Bitcoin Reserve Stalls as Treasury and Commerce Vie for Control: Report
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

U.S. Bitcoin Reserve Stalls as Treasury and Commerce Vie for Control: Report
A dispute between the Treasury and Commerce departments over who should oversee the proposed U.S. Strategic Bitcoin Reserve has delayed its rollout more than a year after President Trump ordered its creation, according to a Bloomberg report.
This post U.S. Bitcoin Reserve Stalls as Treasury and Commerce Vie for Control: Report first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

articles.title: Coinbase Wins UK License to Offer Stocks and Derivatives Alongside Crypto
articles.summary: The FCA authorization lets the exchange offer equities and derivatives to UK users, a step toward its "everything exchange" ambitions.

Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin Suisse Wins Abu Dhabi License, Extends Digital Asset Push into the UAE
Bitcoin Suisse won regulatory approval in Abu Dhabi, allowing it to offer institutional crypto services across the UAE.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Has Bitcoin bottomed for this cycle? Analysts say 'not yet'
articles.summary: Some Bitcoin analysts point to a deeper downside risk, while others believes they can see the early signs of a recovery.

articles.title: Bitcoin nears cycle bottom as over half of supply is held at a loss, says K33
articles.summary: K33 said Bitcoin has historically bottomed within weeks of more than half of its circulating supply being held at a loss, with strong one-year returns following in most previous cycles.

articles.title: Bitcoin, XRP draw Japanese firms as weak yen drives treasury diversification
Bernstein maintains $36 TeraWulf target after $19 billion, 20-year Anthropic lease
articles.summary: Bernstein held its $36 TeraWulf price target after the miner's $19 billion Anthropic lease and $530 million sale of its Abernathy JV stake.

articles.title: Bitcoin’s early July bounce rides thin summer liquidity as half of supply still sits underwater: analysts
articles.summary: BTC traded around $63,500 after a six-day rally as Wintermute and Bitfinex flagged weak ETF demand, while K33 said 50% of supply is at a loss.

articles.title: EU lawmakers adopt digital assets policy stance after MiCA transition ends
articles.summary: The European Parliament adopted a digital assets report calling for further assessment of DeFi, staking, crypto lending and NFTs after MiCA’s transition period ended.

articles.title: Morning Minute: Strategy Turns Net Seller
articles.summary: Michael Saylor becomes a major Bitcoin seller. A memecoin gets "exploited" via governance. And Bernstein doubles down on a $150k BTC call.

articles.title: Coinbase gets UK license to expand into derivatives, equities
articles.summary: Coinbase said its UK investment services authorization will allow institutional and advanced traders to access derivatives, while retail users will be able to trade equities.

articles.title: Coinbase secures UK investment services license to add derivatives and equities trading
articles.summary: Coinbase secured a UK investment services license to offer derivatives and equities trading in addition to crypto.

articles.title: Coinbase secures UK authorization to offer traditional investments alongside crypto
Traders Sue Polymarket Over 'No' Ruling on Strategy Bitcoin Sale
articles.summary: The plaintiffs say Polymarket added a rule after the fact, turning their winning "Yes" bet on Strategy's Bitcoin sale into a loss.

articles.title: Chainwire Parent MediaFuse Launches Tech Newswire Optimized for AI Search
articles.summary: TechnologyWire pitches guaranteed placement across tech media, alongside content tuned to be picked up by tools like ChatGPT and Gemini.

articles.title: Bitcoin's July gains may be fleeting as U.S. demand stays weak
Ctrl Wallet to shut weeks after security exploit
articles.summary: The move follows a June 23 exploit that has now resulted in closing down the wallet, with users urged to withdraw their assets before all functions are disabled on Aug. 3, 2026.

articles.title: Bitcoin stalls as open interest decline raises questions about rally's staying power
Vitalik Buterin confirms AI identified his anonymous Ethereum proposal contribution
articles.summary: The Ethereum co-founder said AI recognized his intellectual habits, ending a two-week public challenge to identify an anonymous contribution he made.

articles.title: Bitcoin can fall below $58K if one of its 'cleanest' metrics copies history: Analysis
articles.summary: Bitcoin NUPL metric data suggested that BTC price action should make new cycle lows in order to preserve historical patterns.

articles.title: Galaxy delivers 133 MW of critical IT load to CoreWeave as Helios bitcoin mine turns AI hub
articles.summary: Galaxy delivered 133 MW of critical IT load to CoreWeave at its Helios campus, completing Phase I of the West Texas site's AI conversion.

articles.title: Digital Chamber amicus brief urges dismissal of NY lawsuit over 39,069 Bitcoin wallets
articles.summary: The Digital Chamber filed an amicus brief urging the dismissal of the New York lawsuit seeking ownership of 39,069 dormant Bitcoin wallets, arguing it would set a dangerous precedent for self-custodial wallets.

articles.title: Tether’s former CIO seeks buyers for part of his stake in the firm: Bloomberg
articles.summary: Former Tether CIO Richard Heathcote is seeking buyers for part of his 1.26% stake in the firm, according to Bloomberg.

articles.title: Upbit, Naver stock-swap deal faces second delay amid proposed crypto law debate
articles.summary: The companies said that the development of the country's landmark crypto legislation could affect the deal's progress or outcome.
